intended_use: Broncholab provides physicians with reproducible CT values for pulmonary tissue for providing quantitative support for diagnosis and follow-up examination. Broncholab can be used to support physicians
intended_use_full: Broncholab provides physicians with reproducible CT values for pulmonary tissue for providing quantitative support for diagnosis and follow-up examination. Broncholab can be used to support physicians in the diagnosis and documentation of pulmonary tissues images (e.g., abnormalities) from CT thoracic datasets. Three-D segmentation and isolation of subcompartments, volumetric analysis, density evaluations, low density cluster analysis, fissure evaluation and reporting tools are combined with a dedicated workflow.
ground_truth: For lobe volume, emphysema, blood vessel density, PD15, and fissure integrity: predicate device (VIDA Pulmonary Workstation 2). For airway volume: mean segmentation from three physicians.
other_metrics: For lobe volume, emphysema, and blood vessel density (relative values): mean differences <5% vs predicate. For absolute values: mean differences less than 150mL threshold. For PD15: mean difference <1 HU. For fissure integrity: ICC 0.75 (95% CI 0.54, 0.87). For airway volume (relative): mean difference <5%; (absolute): mean difference <150mL.
